# Claude Code prompt — [Fix] Card header field affordance — make editable fields discoverable

*Paste below the line. Generated by Cowork, 2026-05-28.*

---

You are working on `GH-Mantova/ProjectOperations`. Read `CLAUDE.md` and follow it.

## Background

PR #239 added card-header summary fields on each discipline card: **Peak crew**, **Labour days**, **Plant**, **Duration (days)**. These fields are editable (clicking the value lets the user override the auto-derived number), and after override they show with the orange `--surface-override` tint to indicate they've been customised.

**Bug:** before override, these fields look exactly like static text. There's no visual hint they're editable. Estimators don't realise they can click to override unless they accidentally try.

## Phase 0

- `git fetch origin`; branch off `main`: `fix/card-header-affordance`.

## Fix — apply Option (d): subtle tint + thin border + hover tooltip

Owner's choice: combine (a) subtle background tint + thin border so fields look like inputs, with (c) tooltip on hover ("Click to edit").

In `apps/web/src/pages/tendering/ScopeQuantitiesTable.tsx` (or wherever the card header is rendered — the same file PR #239 added the header to), apply this styling to each of the four header fields (Peak crew value, Labour days value, Plant value, Duration value):

### Resting state (not overridden)

- `background-color: var(--surface-subtle, #F5F5F4)` — very faint grey (slightly darker than the card body background)
- `border: 1px solid var(--border-subtle, #E5E5E4)` — barely-there grey line
- `border-radius: var(--radius-sm, 4px)`
- `padding: 2px 6px`
- `cursor: pointer`
- Tooltip via `title="Click to edit"` attribute

### Hover state

- `background-color: var(--surface-hover, #EEEEEC)` — slight darken
- `border-color: var(--border-default, #D5D5D4)`

### Overridden state (existing — keep)

- `background-color: var(--surface-override, #FDD387)` (from PR #239)
- Border same as resting state OR omitted (the override tint is loud enough on its own)
- Revert (↺) icon visible on hover

### Editing state (when the field is being edited)

- Standard input styling — the existing edit-mode styling stays as-is.

If `--surface-subtle`, `--border-subtle`, `--surface-hover`, `--border-default`, `--radius-sm` don't exist in `apps/web/src/styles/tokens.css`, add them with the values above. Use existing token names if there are equivalents already.

## Tests

- Visual smoke: open a card, confirm the four header fields have a subtle background + border in their resting state and look distinct from the surrounding card body.
- Hover tooltip appears on each of the four fields ("Click to edit").
- After override, the fields show the orange tint per PR #239's existing behaviour — the resting tint/border is replaced by the override styling.
- §6 pre-PR CI checklist green.

## PR

- Title: `[Fix] Card header field affordance — make editable fields discoverable`
- Body: describe the styling change, mention it's Option (d) from the brainstorm, screenshots if possible.
- Reviewer `GH-Mantova`.
- **Do NOT auto-merge.** Owner verifies the resting/hover/overridden states all read correctly.

## Scope

Only the styling of the four card-header summary fields. Do not change the underlying click-to-edit or override logic, do not touch other parts of the card header (markup %, discipline picker).
